segments.text: Man, I really don't wanna get caught
segments.original_text: いやもう当たりたくないですね

segments.text: Just getting juggled like that freaks me out
segments.original_text: 浮かされるだけでヒヤッとしてしまいます

full_text: Man, I really don't wanna get caught Just getting juggled like that freaks me out From above Oh no!
